sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports right hand index finger pain and reports taking ibuprofen for it. He also reports recent constipation and uses miralax.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals tenderness over the distal phalanx of the right index finger. X-rays are normal with no fractures.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a right hand index finger contusion.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a s-aluminum foam splint and motrin. Order miralax for constipation.
